subject: Password reset email never arrived
body: I requested a password reset twice and nothing has hit my inbox or spam folder.

subject: Dashboard very slow this afternoon
body: Pages that normally load in a second are taking 15 to 20 seconds. Reports are especially slow and time out sometimes.

subject: Request for dark mode
body: Our support team works nights and would really appreciate a dark mode.

subject: Typo in invoice email
body: Your invoice email says 'reciept' instead of 'receipt'.

subject: Can't invite teammate
body: The invite modal spins forever after I enter my teammate's email address.

subject: Search results not matching exact account name
body: Searching the exact customer account name returns unrelated records first, so reps are opening the wrong accounts.
